content.en:
The years passed.

Ye Tian and the others found a lot of ruin stones, and they gained more and more.

Gradually, the ruin stone of this mountain range was almost found, and the ruin stone python in this area was almost killed by Ye Tian and them.

"I can't find the Xuyang Stone!"

The Lord of the Mystic has the idea of leaving here, after all, this treasure land is not only the Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side and this Xuyang Stone Mountain Range.

And the other other shore-level geniuses naturally agreed with this decision.

Then, they crossed the Xuyang Stone Mountain Range and continued their progress.

Soon.

They saw an area of purple mist.

They didn't know if there was anything good here, so they all looked at the Lord of Mystery.

Whether you want to go in or not depends on the Lord of Mystery.

"Endless Lord, this purple mist area is a little weird, how far is it difficult for the will of the Origin Realm to penetrate, can you go in and explore one or two?"

The Lord of Mystery pleaded.

After all, if he really encountered danger, Ye Tian's strength would be able to withdraw, while other other world-level geniuses might not be able to withdraw.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

At any moment, he directly entered the purple mist area.

This area of purple mist was of no other use than suppressing the will of the Origin Realm.

He walked around, nothing happened, and came out.

"Lord of the Mysteries, everyone, I went in a bit, but I didn't find much. However, the purple mist will suppress the will of the Origin Realm, and it is difficult to peer far. And the area seems so vast that I can't tell what's going on in the distance. Ye Tian introduced.

"Since there is no danger, let's go in together!"

The Lord of the Mysteries.

The other other shore-level geniuses nodded one after another, and followed the Lord of Mystery in.

Since it is difficult to sense the situation at a distance, they are naturally extremely careful.

Soon.

They found an item.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian and the others came to a stone.

It was a purple stone with a special smell that caught their attention.

The Lord of the Dragons touched the stone and probed it carefully.

Soon, they had a guess.

"This should be the Purple Void Stone on the other side, right?"

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard.

"It should be it!" the Lord of the Golden Moon guessed.

The Lord of Mystery showed excitement, "The Purple Ruins Stone on the other side has appeared here, then this should be the legendary Purple Mist Domain on the other side." "

For the special treasure land of the Purple Mist Domain on the other side, she had only heard of it, but had not seen it, so she didn't recognize it.

"What's the use of the Purple Ruins Stone on the other side?"

Ye Tian didn't know this kind of treasure, so he asked curiously.

The Lord of the Mystic introduced: "The use of the Purple Ruins Stone on the other side is to refine the purple ruin liquid on the other side, which can quench the immeasurable bone or the golden bone on the other side. For the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, it also has the effect of improving physical fitness. "

"The Purple Ruin Stone on the other side is just one of the most common resources in the Purple Mist Domain on the other side, and the real good thing here is the Purple Ruin Lake on the other side. If you can find Zixu Lake on the other side, that is the real resource!"

Purple Market Lake on the other side?

Ye Tian hadn't heard of it again.

But in the introduction of the Lord of Mystery and the Lord of the Dragon Lizard, he gradually learned the value of the Purple Ruins Lake on the other side.

The water of Zixu Lake on the other side is called the Zixu gold liquid on the other side, and soaking in the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side can quickly expand the origin of the other side.

In other words, the Purple Ruins Gold Liquid on the other side was suitable for the cultivation of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

In short, its value was enough for the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors to fight desperately.

They don't need the Purple Ruins Gold Liquid on the other side now, but they can take it out!

"I'll put away this purple ruin stone on the other side first!"

The Lord of the Mystic put away this purple ruin stone on the other side.

Subsequently.

They continued to search for the Purple Ruins Stone on the other side and the Purple Ruins Lake on the other side.

If you find Zixu Lake on the other side, that is the real chance!

And since there was no danger at first, they let their guard down a little.

Abrupt!

Ye Tian's copy body sensed the talent of a creature, and only then did he discover this creature.

【Purple Ruin Worm】

But because the range of his copying talent was suppressed, after he sensed this purple ruin insect, it was too late to alert the other other shore-level geniuses.

Rumble!

He tried to stop the Purple Ruin Worm, but the speed was still a little slower.

Burst!

One of the tentacles of the Purple Ruin Worm instantly penetrated the body of a genius of the other side.

Immediately afterward, this other shore-level genius directly disintegrated and fell.

And Ye Tian's attack also came, shattering the body of this purple ruin insect with one blow and killing it.

After this scene happened, the other other shore-level geniuses reacted, and their faces were frightened.

"A genius of the other side was killed in an instant!"

The lords of the dragon lizards trembled.

He actually sensed it, but it wasn't too late to stop it.

Moreover, the strength of this purple ruin insect should be no less than him, otherwise it would not be able to kill a genius of the other side in an instant.

"Array!"

The Lord of Mystery shouted.

One by one, the other side level geniuses set up a formation to protect the Lord of Mystery.

And the Lord of the Dragon Lizard, they are still in the formation, and they are not worried about anything.

After all, this Purple Ruin Worm could kill other other Shore-level geniuses, but it couldn't kill them.

Then.

Ye Tianlai inspected the corpse of the Purple Ruin Insect.

"The physical body is weak, but the speed is extremely fast, and the attack power of the tentacles is very terrifying, it can easily penetrate the flesh of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm other side level geniuses, unless you practice a complete Golden Body on the other side, you can block the attack. "

Ye Tian judged.

"Be careful, everyone!"

The Lord of the Dragons also reminded.

Next, the other other shore-level geniuses were also more careful, after all, a shore-level genius had just fallen!

This is also the first time that this group of other shore-level geniuses has died after they came in.

Time passes.

They encountered one after another Zixu stones on the other side, but they did not find the Zixu Lake on the other side.

Of course, the harvest of the Purple Ruins Stone on the other side alone is also quite good.

And from time to time, they will also encounter attacks by purple ruin insects.

But.

After they were prepared, there were no more casualties.

And every time the Purple Ruin Insect attacked, Ye Tian could kill it.

Before they knew it, they had been in the Purple Mist Domain on the other side for many days.

this day.

Ye Tian and the others finally found a lake.

"I've found Zixu Lake on the other side!"

All the other side level geniuses were very excited.

However.

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

"Be careful, there's something wrong with this Zixu Lake on the other side, I'm afraid there are hidden Zixu insects inside!"

Ye Tian reminded.
